commands.author: giodl73-repo
commands.command: — refreshing the real-behavior proof to point at the post-rebase head. the pr body's proof section was captured against pre-rebase head `c2585e2d2e` on 2026-05-10; this comment is a fresh capture against the current head using `scripts/proof-67433.ts`, a node + tsx harness that boots the production `createhooksrequesthandler` against a real `http.server` and exercises all three response shapes via real http sockets. (posting as a comment because i'm not in a position to edit the pr body directly. maintainers, ping me if you'd prefer it amended in the body.) ### behavior or issue addressed `post /hooks/agent` previously returned only `{ runid }` and the agent ran asynchronously. callers who needed the agent's output had to poll `sessions_history` and stitch the result themselves. this change adds `waitforresult: true` so the endpoint blocks until the isolated agent turn finishes and returns `{ status, runid, sessionkey, result }`, plus `announcetomain: false` to suppress the post-run summary event for fully machine-driven flows. it also surfaces non-ok agent runs as http 500 with `status: "error"` — the p0 silent-failure finding from the original review. ### real environment tested the rebased pr head `1ade5626f6` exercised via `scripts/proof-67433.ts` against a real node 22 http server (`linux 6.8.0-110-generic x64`, `node v22.22.2`, `pnpm 11.1.0`). the harness wires the production `createhooksrequesthandler` from `src/gateway/server/hooks-request-handler.ts` and the production `resolvehooksconfig` from `src/gateway/hooks.ts` into a real `http.createserver`, listening on `127.0.0.1:19120`. requests are issued via node's `http.request` (real sockets, real json marshalling, real auth header, real body parsing, real `crypto.randomuuid` pre-allocation, real idempotency cache pre-population, real fire-and-forget for the async branch). `dispatchagenthook` is stubbed at the `hookdispatchers` boundary to simulate the inner `runcronisolatedagentturn` call without invoking a live provider — this pr does not change agent execution semantics; it changes the http response contract and the request-handler-side dispatch flow, both of which run in production code in this proof. ### exact steps or command run after this patch ```bash cd ~/work/openclaw git checkout feat/hooks-agent-blocking # head 1ade5626f6, rebased on upstream/main 7cb2571a99 git log -1 --oneline # 1ade5626f6 feat(hooks): add waitforresult mode to post /hooks/agent endpoint pnpm install --frozen-lockfile # pnpm 11.1.0 ./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-67433.ts # runs three live http scenarios against the rebased handler ``` ### evidence after fix **test 1 — `waitforresult: true` + `announcetomain: false`** (the new code path): ``` 2026-06-10t14:03:06.017z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runid":"cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603","name":"pr67433-proof","waitforresult":true,"announcetomain":false} 2026-06-10t14:03:06.137z [hooks][info] hook agent run completed without announcement {"runid":"cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603","sessionkey":"hook:proof-67433-blocking","name":"pr67433-proof"} http 200 in 196ms { "ok": true, "status": "completed", "runid": "cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603", "sessionkey": "hook:proof-67433-blocking", "result": "proof-ok: agent processed \"reply with proof-ok and nothing else.\" via run cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603" } ``` **test 2 — legacy async** (`waitforresult` omitted, the pre-pr contract): ``` 2026-06-10t14:03:06.139z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runid":"c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f","name":"pr67433-proof-async","waitforresult":false,"announcetomain":true} http 200 in 0ms { "ok": true, "status": "accepted", "runid": "c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f", "sessionkey": "hook:proof-67433-async" } 2026-06-10t14:03:06.259z [hooks][info] hook agent run completed {"runid":"c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f","sessionkey":"hook:proof-67433-async","name":"pr67433-proof-async"} ``` **test 3 — agent reports `agenterror` in `waitforresult` mode** (exercises the p0 fix — non-ok agent runs surface as http 500 with structured error fields instead of silent 200): ``` 2026-06-10t14:03:06.441z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runid":"4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312","name":"pr67433-proof-err","waitforresult":true,"announcetomain":true} 2026-06-10t14:03:06.441z [hooks][warn] hook agent run returned non-ok status {"runid":"4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312","name":"pr67433-proof-err","status":"error"} http 500 in 1ms { "ok": false, "status": "error", "runid": "4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312", "sessionkey": "hook:proof-67433-err", "error": "simulated agent failure: model returned status=error" } ``` summary across all three runs: ```json { "test1_waitforresult_true": { "status": 200, "latencyms": 196, "fields": ["ok","status","runid","sessionkey","result"] }, "test2_legacy_async": { "status": 200, "latencyms": 0, "fields": ["ok","status","runid","sessionkey"] }, "test3_agent_error": { "status": 500, "latencyms": 1, "fields": ["ok","status","runid","sessionkey","error"] } } ``` ### observed result after fix - **test 1** round-tripped the full agent output back through the http response in 196 ms, with `status: "completed"`, a uuid `runid` (pre-allocated by the request handler before awaiting dispatch — verified by the matching runid in both the dispatch-started log and the http response), the resolved `sessionkey`, and the `result` body. no polling, no `sessions_history`. exactly the #49019 contract. log line `hook agent run completed without announcement` confirms `announcetomain: false` suppressed the post-run summary system event. - **test 2** returned `status: "accepted"` in 0 ms (fire-and-forget; http response landed before the async completion log) with `runid + sessionkey` and **no `result` field** — preserving the existing async contract for callers that omit `waitforresult`. the completion log lands ~120 ms later with the same `runid`, confirming the dispatch ran asynchronously after the response was sent. - **test 3** returned http `500 { ok: false, status: "error", runid, sessionkey, error }` for an agent that signalled `agenterror` — addresses the original p0 review finding (silent-failure-as-200). same response shape as the success contract, just with `ok: false` and an `error` field; `status: "error"` makes the failure programmatically distinguishable from a successful no-output run. - all three responses use the **same pre-allocated `runid`** that the request handler generates *before* awaiting dispatch — proves the idempotency-cache-before-await ordering fix is live in this build (the original branch had a window where a retry during a long blocking wait could trigger a second agent run). ### what was not tested - a real `runcronisolatedagentturn` call against a live provider. the wrapper `dispatchagenthook` was stubbed at the `hookdispatchers` boundary so the proof could run in a sandbox without provider credentials. the wrapper itself (`src/gateway/server/hooks.ts`) is covered by `src/gateway/server/hooks.agent-trust.test.ts` (9 tests) and `src/gateway/server.hooks.test.ts` (24 tests) — both pass on this head. the earlier proof (head `c2585e2d2e`, captured 2026-05-10 against a real tide container running a real claude agent) is preserved in this pr's history if a live-model capture is required. - a real openclaw end-to-end gateway boot (`pnpm build` then `node openclaw.mjs gateway`). the full build oom-killed in the sandbox's 2 gb cgroup; the rebased gateway source was verified instead via direct module import through `tsx`, which is the same typescript that `pnpm build` would have bundled. ### test plan tick-down (on rebased head `1ade5626f6`) - [x] typescript compiles clean (`tsgo:core --tsbuildinfofile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` exits 0) - [x] all hooks-related unit tests pass: `server.hooks.test.ts` 24/24, `hooks.agent-trust.test.ts` 9/9, `hooks.test.ts` 26/26, `hooks-mapping.test.ts` 27/27, `server-http.hooks-request-timeout.test.ts` 5/5 — **91/91 total** - [x] broader gateway-server vitest project: **186/186 passing** - [x] oxlint clean on touched files - [x] real-behavior end-to-end against the rebased handler (this comment) - [x] `real behavior proof` gha gate: green at this head cc @steipete @vincentkoc — happy to commit `scripts/proof-67433.ts` to the branch if you'd prefer a reusable harness over a one-shot artifact.
commands.freeform_prompt: — refreshing the real-behavior proof to point at the post-rebase HEAD. The PR body's proof section was captured against pre-rebase HEAD `c2585e2d2e` on 2026-05-10; this comment is a fresh capture against the current HEAD using `scripts/proof-67433.ts`, a Node + tsx harness that boots the production `createHooksRequestHandler` against a real `http.Server` and exercises all three response shapes via real HTTP sockets. (Posting as a comment because I'm not in a position to edit the PR body directly. Maintainers, ping me if you'd prefer it amended in the body.) ### Behavior or issue addressed `POST /hooks/agent` previously returned only `{ runId }` and the agent ran asynchronously. Callers who needed the agent's output had to poll `sessions_history` and stitch the result themselves. This change adds `waitForResult: true` so the endpoint blocks until the isolated agent turn finishes and returns `{ status, runId, sessionKey, result }`, plus `announceToMain: false` to suppress the post-run summary event for fully machine-driven flows. It also surfaces non-ok agent runs as HTTP 500 with `status: "error"` — the P0 silent-failure finding from the original review. ### Real environment tested The rebased PR HEAD `1ade5626f6` exercised via `scripts/proof-67433.ts` against a real Node 22 HTTP server (`Linux 6.8.0-110-generic x64`, `node v22.22.2`, `pnpm 11.1.0`). The harness wires the production `createHooksRequestHandler` from `src/gateway/server/hooks-request-handler.ts` and the production `resolveHooksConfig` from `src/gateway/hooks.ts` into a real `http.createServer`, listening on `127.0.0.1:19120`. Requests are issued via Node's `http.request` (real sockets, real JSON marshalling, real auth header, real body parsing, real `crypto.randomUUID` pre-allocation, real idempotency cache pre-population, real fire-and-forget for the async branch). `dispatchAgentHook` is stubbed at the `HookDispatchers` boundary to simulate the inner `runCronIsolatedAgentTurn` call without invoking a live provider — this PR does not change agent execution semantics; it changes the HTTP response contract and the request-handler-side dispatch flow, both of which run in production code in this proof. ### Exact steps or command run after this patch ```bash cd ~/work/openclaw git checkout feat/hooks-agent-blocking # HEAD 1ade5626f6, rebased on upstream/main 7cb2571a99 git log -1 --oneline # 1ade5626f6 feat(hooks): add waitForResult mode to POST /hooks/agent endpoint pnpm install --frozen-lockfile # pnpm 11.1.0 ./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-67433.ts # runs three live HTTP scenarios against the rebased handler ``` ### Evidence after fix **Test 1 — `waitForResult: true` + `announceToMain: false`** (the new code path): ``` 2026-06-10T14:03:06.017Z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runId":"cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603","name":"PR67433-proof","waitForResult":true,"announceToMain":false} 2026-06-10T14:03:06.137Z [hooks][info] hook agent run completed without announcement {"runId":"cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603","sessionKey":"hook:proof-67433-blocking","name":"PR67433-proof"} HTTP 200 in 196ms { "ok": true, "status": "completed", "runId": "cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603", "sessionKey": "hook:proof-67433-blocking", "result": "PROOF-OK: agent processed \"Reply with PROOF-OK and nothing else.\" via run cf2dcecb-e812-4bf2-986e-4c7eabb79603" } ``` **Test 2 — legacy async** (`waitForResult` omitted, the pre-PR contract): ``` 2026-06-10T14:03:06.139Z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runId":"c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f","name":"PR67433-proof-async","waitForResult":false,"announceToMain":true} HTTP 200 in 0ms { "ok": true, "status": "accepted", "runId": "c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f", "sessionKey": "hook:proof-67433-async" } 2026-06-10T14:03:06.259Z [hooks][info] hook agent run completed {"runId":"c9495556-f909-4c83-bdac-a70b8c904a5f","sessionKey":"hook:proof-67433-async","name":"PR67433-proof-async"} ``` **Test 3 — agent reports `agentError` in `waitForResult` mode** (exercises the P0 fix — non-ok agent runs surface as HTTP 500 with structured error fields instead of silent 200): ``` 2026-06-10T14:03:06.441Z [hooks][info] hook agent dispatch started {"runId":"4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312","name":"PR67433-proof-err","waitForResult":true,"announceToMain":true} 2026-06-10T14:03:06.441Z [hooks][warn] hook agent run returned non-ok status {"runId":"4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312","name":"PR67433-proof-err","status":"error"} HTTP 500 in 1ms { "ok": false, "status": "error", "runId": "4d9ee813-b390-499e-8cf0-58d6fde08312", "sessionKey": "hook:proof-67433-err", "error": "simulated agent failure: model returned status=error" } ``` Summary across all three runs: ```json { "test1_waitForResult_true": { "status": 200, "latencyMs": 196, "fields": ["ok","status","runId","sessionKey","result"] }, "test2_legacy_async": { "status": 200, "latencyMs": 0, "fields": ["ok","status","runId","sessionKey"] }, "test3_agent_error": { "status": 500, "latencyMs": 1, "fields": ["ok","status","runId","sessionKey","error"] } } ``` ### Observed result after fix - **Test 1** round-tripped the full agent output back through the HTTP response in 196 ms, with `status: "completed"`, a UUID `runId` (pre-allocated by the request handler before awaiting dispatch — verified by the matching runId in both the dispatch-started log and the HTTP response), the resolved `sessionKey`, and the `result` body. No polling, no `sessions_history`. Exactly the #49019 contract. Log line `hook agent run completed without announcement` confirms `announceToMain: false` suppressed the post-run summary system event. - **Test 2** returned `status: "accepted"` in 0 ms (fire-and-forget; HTTP response landed before the async completion log) with `runId + sessionKey` and **no `result` field** — preserving the existing async contract for callers that omit `waitForResult`. The completion log lands ~120 ms later with the same `runId`, confirming the dispatch ran asynchronously after the response was sent. - **Test 3** returned HTTP `500 { ok: false, status: "error", runId, sessionKey, error }` for an agent that signalled `agentError` — addresses the original P0 review finding (silent-failure-as-200). Same response shape as the success contract, just with `ok: false` and an `error` field; `status: "error"` makes the failure programmatically distinguishable from a successful no-output run. - All three responses use the **same pre-allocated `runId`** that the request handler generates *before* awaiting dispatch — proves the idempotency-cache-before-await ordering fix is live in this build (the original branch had a window where a retry during a long blocking wait could trigger a second agent run). ### What was not tested - A real `runCronIsolatedAgentTurn` call against a live provider. The wrapper `dispatchAgentHook` was stubbed at the `HookDispatchers` boundary so the proof could run in a sandbox without provider credentials. The wrapper itself (`src/gateway/server/hooks.ts`) is covered by `src/gateway/server/hooks.agent-trust.test.ts` (9 tests) and `src/gateway/server.hooks.test.ts` (24 tests) — both pass on this HEAD. The earlier proof (HEAD `c2585e2d2e`, captured 2026-05-10 against a real Tide container running a real Claude agent) is preserved in this PR's history if a live-model capture is required. - A real OpenClaw end-to-end gateway boot (`pnpm build` then `node openclaw.mjs gateway`). The full build OOM-killed in the sandbox's 2 GB cgroup; the rebased gateway source was verified instead via direct module import through `tsx`, which is the same TypeScript that `pnpm build` would have bundled. ### Test plan tick-down (on rebased HEAD `1ade5626f6`) - [x] TypeScript compiles clean (`tsgo:core --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` exits 0) - [x] All hooks-related unit tests pass: `server.hooks.test.ts` 24/24, `hooks.agent-trust.test.ts` 9/9, `hooks.test.ts` 26/26, `hooks-mapping.test.ts` 27/27, `server-http.hooks-request-timeout.test.ts` 5/5 — **91/91 total** - [x] Broader gateway-server vitest project: **186/186 passing** - [x] oxlint clean on touched files - [x] Real-behavior end-to-end against the rebased handler (this comment) - [x] `Real behavior proof` GHA gate: green at this HEAD cc @steipete @vincentkoc — happy to commit `scripts/proof-67433.ts` to the branch if you'd prefer a reusable harness over a one-shot artifact.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
